title: Fast Crafts
description: Add tons of recipes to Minecraft to craft stuff faster
body:
# Fast Crafts | NOTE WONT WORK IN 1.20.5

**This datapacks mains goal is to reduce time by crafting stuff out of packed versions or more in the crafting interface**

**Also adds modded recipes like logs to chest or sticks and my own custom ones like planks to ladders**

## NOTES

**You can still use the old recipes if needed**

**And if there's any issues or enhancements you like to report click issues or [here!](https://github.com/DeadbushCarrot/Fast-Crafts)**

**FAST FIREWORKS HAVE A FLIGHT TIME OF 0.5 THIS IS DUE TO THE CRAFTING OF NORMAL FIREWORKS**
